title: Writing SIEM Detection Rules
content: Detection engineering focuses on identifying malicious activity through log analysis.  Example detection logic:     Multiple failed logins   Privilege escalation events   Suspicious PowerShell execution

title: Common Active Directory Attacks
content: Active Directory environments introduce several attack vectors.  Kerberoasting  Attackers request service tickets and crack them offline.  Pass-the-Hash  Authentication occurs using NTLM hashes rather than plaintext passwords.

title: Malware Analysis Basics
